fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the table where the record that is subject to approval is stored.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that an approval entry has been created for. Approval entries can be created for six different types of sales or purchase documents:

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the document that was sent for approval. The number is copied from the relevant sales or purchase document, such as a purchase order or a sales quote.

fields.name: Sent to ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who sent the mail notifying the approver that they has document approvals that are overdue.

fields.name: Sent Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the overdue notification mail was sent to the approver who should approve the document.

fields.name: Sent Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the overdue notification mail was sent to the approver who should approve the document.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the email address of the user to whom the overdue notification was sent.

fields.name: Sequence No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order of approvers when an approval workflow involves more than one approver.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the document is due for approval.

fields.name: Approver ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who must approve the document.
